# Data Model: mos_target_wd_gaia_dr3


MOS Target Table: wd_gaia_dr3


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example HDUS List](#example-hdus-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
Catalogue of white dwarfs in Gaia EDR3 Gentile Fusillo et al. (2021).

### Naming Convention
$MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_wd_gaia_dr3.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='fits' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

### Releases
DR20

### Enviroments
MOS_TARGET

### Approximate Size
400 MB

### File Type
FITS

### Generated by Product
sdss5db targeting database.

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
2.3.3

### HDUS List for release DR20
  - [HDU0: PRIMARY](#hdu0-primary)
  - [HDU1](#hdu1)

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

##### Binary Table Caption for HDU1
Name | Type | Unit | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
 | wdjname | char[23] |  | WD name (JHHMMSS.ss+DDMMSS.ss) equinox and epoch 2000 |
 | gaiaedr3 | int64 |  | Gaia EDR3 source_id |
 | gaiadr2 | int64 |  | Gaia DR2 source_id |
 | edr3name | char[29] |  | GaiaEDR3 name (Gaia EDR3 NNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNNN) |
 | radeg | float64 | deg | Gaia EDR3 Barycentric right ascension (ICRS) at Ep=2016.0 |
 | e_radeg | float64 | mas | Gaia EDR3 standard error on right ascension, e_RA=e_RA*cosDE |
 | dedeg | float64 | deg | Gaia EDR3 Barycentric declination (ICRS) at Ep=2016.0 |
 | e_dedeg | float64 | mas | Gaia EDR3 standard error on declination |
 | plx | float64 | mas | Gaia EDR3 Absolute stellar parallax at Ep=2016.0 |
 | e_plx | float64 | mas | Gaia EDR3 parallax error |
 | rplx | float64 |  | Gaia EDR3 Parallax divided by its standard error |
 | zpcor | float64 |  | Zero point offset correction (Lindegren et al., 2020A&A...633A...2L) |
 | pwd | float64 |  | The probability of being a white dwarf |
 | density | int64 |  | The number of Gaia sources in the same ~= 50 arcsec sq. bin as this object |
 | solid | int64 |  | Gaia EDR3 Solution ID |
 | randomi | int64 |  | Gaia EDR3 Random index used to select subsets |
 | epoch | int64 | yr | Gaia EDR3 Reference epoch |
 | pm | float64 | mas/yr | Gaia EDR3 Total proper motion |
 | e_pm | float64 | mas/yr | Gaia EDR3 Total proper motion error |
 | pmra | float64 | mas/yr | Gaia EDR3 Proper motion in RA, pmRA*cosDE |
 | e_pmra | float64 | mas/yr | Gaia EDR3 Proper motion in RA error |
 | pmde | float64 | mas/yr | Gaia EDR3 Proper motion in DE |
 | e_pmde | float64 | mas/yr | Gaia EDR3 Proper motion in DE error |
 | radecor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between right ascension and declination |
 | raplxcor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between right ascension and parallax |
 | rapmracor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between right ascension and proper motion in right ascension |
 | rapmdecor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between right ascension and proper motion in declination |
 | deplxcor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between declination and parallax |
 | depmracor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between declination and proper motion in right ascension |
 | depmdecor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between declination and proper motion in declination |
 | plxpmracor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between parallax and proper motion in right ascension |
 | plxpmdecor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between parallax and proper motion in declination |
 | pmrapmdecor | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between proper motion in right ascension and proper motion in declination |
 | nal | int64 |  | Total number of observations AL |
 | nac | int64 |  | Total number of observations AC |
 | ngal | int64 |  | Number of good observations AL |
 | nbal | int64 |  | Number of bad observations AL |
 | gofal | float64 |  | Goodness of fit statistic of model wrt along-scan observations |
 | chi2al | float64 |  | AL chi-square value |
 | epsi | float64 | mas | Excess noise of the source |
 | sepsi | float64 |  | Significance of excess noise |
 | solved | int64 |  | Which parameters have been solved for? |
 | apf | int64 |  | Primary or secondary |
 | nueff | float64 | um-1 | Effective wavenumber of the source used in the astrometric solution |
 | pscol | float64 | um | Astrometrically estimated pseudocolour of the source |
 | e_pscol | float64 | um | Standard error of the pseudocolour of the source |
 | rapscolcorr | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between right ascension and pseudocolour |
 | depscolcorr | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between declination and pseudocolour |
 | plxpscolcorr | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between parallax and pseudocolour |
 | pmrapscolcorr | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between proper motion in right ascension and pseudocolour |
 | pmdepscolcorr | float64 | -1/1 | Correlation between proper motion in declination and pseudocolour |
 | matchobsa | int64 |  | Matched FOV transits used in the AGIS solution |
 | nper | int64 |  | Number of visibility periods used in Astrometric solution |
 | amax | float64 | mas | The longest semi-major axis of the 5--10 error ellipsoid |
 | matchobs | int64 |  | The total number of field-of-view transits matched to this source |
 | newmatchobs | int64 |  | The number of transits newly incorporated into an existing source in the current cycle |
 | matchobsrm | int64 |  | The number of transits removed from an existing source in the current cycle |
 | ipdgofha | float64 |  | Amplitude of the IPD GoF versus position angle of scan |
 | ipdgofhp | float64 |  | Phase of the IPD GoF versus position angle of scan |
 | ipdfmp | int64 |  | Percent of successful-IPD windows with more than one peak |
 | ipdfow | int64 |  | Percent of transits with truncated windows or multiple gate |
 | ruwe | float64 |  | Renormalised unit weight error |
 | sdsk1 | float64 |  | Degree of concentration of scan directions across the source |
 | sdsk2 | float64 |  | Degree of concentration of scan directions across the source |
 | sdsk3 | float64 |  | Degree of concentration of scan directions across the source |
 | sdsk4 | float64 |  | Degree of concentration of scan directions across the source |
 | sdmk1 | float64 |  | Mean position angle of scan directions across the source |
 | sdmk2 | float64 |  | Mean position angle of scan directions across the source |
 | sdmk3 | float64 |  | Mean position angle of scan directions across the source |
 | sdmk4 | float64 |  | Mean position angle of scan directions across the source |
 | dup | int64 |  | Source with multiple source identifiers |
 | o_gmag | int64 |  | Number of observations (CCD transits) that contributed to the G mean flux and mean flux error |
 | fg | float64 | e-/s | Mean flux in the G-band |
 | e_fg | float64 | e-/s | Standard deviation of the G-band fluxes divided by sqrt(photGNObs) |
 | rfg | float64 |  | Mean flux in the G-band divided by its error |
 | gmag_vega | float64 | mag | G-band mean magnitude (Vega) |
 | e_gmag | float64 | mag | Standard error of G-band mean magnitude (Vega) |
 | fgcorr | float64 | mag | Calibration corrected G-band mean flux |
 | gmagcorr | float64 | mag | Calibration corrected G magnitude |
 | e_gmagcorr | float64 | mag | Standard error of calibration corrected G magnitude |
 | o_bpmag | int64 |  | Number of observations contributing to BP photometry |
 | fbp | float64 | e-/s | Mean flux in the integrated BP band |
 | e_fbp | float64 | e-/s | Error on the integrated BP mean flux |
 | rfbp | float64 |  | Integrated BP mean flux divided by its error |
 | bpmag | float64 | mag | Integrated BP mean magnitude (Vega) |
 | e_bpmag | float64 | mag | Standard error of BP mean magnitude (Vega) |
 | o_rpmag | int64 |  | Number of observations (CCD transits) that contributed to the integrated RP mean flux and mean flux error |
 | frp | float64 | e-/s | Mean flux in the integrated RP band |
 | e_frp | float64 | e-/s | Error on the integrated RP mean flux |
 | rfrp | float64 |  | Integrated RP mean flux divided by its error |
 | rpmag | float64 | mag | Integrated RP mean magnitude (Vega) |
 | e_rpmag | float64 | mag | Standard error of RP mean magnitude (Vega) |
 | nbpcont | int64 |  | Number of BP contaminated transits |
 | nbpblend | int64 |  | Number of BP blended transits |
 | nrpcont | int64 |  | Number of RP contaminated transits |
 | nrpblend | int64 |  | Number of RP blended transits |
 | mode | int64 |  | Photometry processing mode |
 | e_bp_rp | float64 |  | BP/RP excess factor |
 | e_bp_rp_corr | float64 |  | BP/RP excess factor corrected for colour dependence (Riello et al., 2021A&A...649A...3R, Cat. J/A+A/649/A3) |
 | gmag_abs | float64 | mag | Absolute G magnitude |
 | bp_rp | float64 | mag | BP-RP colour |
 | bp_g | float64 | mag | BP-G colour |
 | g_rp | float64 | mag | G-RP colour |
 | rv | float64 |  | dr2_radial_velocity (not used) |
 | e_rv | float64 |  | dr2_radial_velocity_error (not used) |
 | o_rv | float64 |  | dr2_rv_nb_transits (not used) |

 | fe_h | float64 |  | dr2_rv_template_fe_h (not used) |
 | glon | float64 | deg | Galactic longitude |
 | glat | float64 | deg | Galactic latitude |
 | elon | float64 | deg | Ecliptic longitude |
 | elat | float64 | deg | Ecliptic latitude |
 | exfluxerr | float64 |  | Metric for source photometric variability |
 | brnflag | int64 |  | If 1 it indicates the presence of a source 5 mag brighter than the target in the G-band within 5" |
 | meanav | float64 | mag | Mean extinction value derived from 3D reddening maps |
 | minav | float64 | mag | Extinction value derived from 3D reddening maps using -1sigma EDR3 distance |
 | maxav | float64 | mag | Extinction value derived from 3D reddening maps using +1sigma EDR3 distance |
 | flagext | int64 |  | Flag |
 | teffh | float64 | K | Effective temperature from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with pure-H model atmospheres |
 | e_teffh | float64 | K | Uncertainty on teff_H |
 | loggh | float64 | cm/s2 | Log of surface gravity from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with pure-H model atmospheres |
 | e_loggh | float64 | cm/s2 | Uncertainty on logg_H |
 | massh | float64 | Msun | Stellar mass resulting from the adopted mass-radius relation and best fit parameters |
 | e_massh | float64 | Msun | Uncertainty on mass_H |
 | chisqh | float64 |  | chi square value of the fit (pure-H) |
 | teffhe | float64 | K | Effective temperature from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with pure-He model atmospheres |
 | e_teffhe | float64 | K | Uncertainty on teff_He |
 | logghe | float64 | cm/s2 | Log of surface gravity from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with pure-He model atmospheres |
 | e_logghe | float64 | cm/s2 | Uncertainty on logg_He |
 | masshe | float64 | Msun | Stellar mass resulting from the adopted mass-radius relation and best fit parameters |
 | e_masshe | float64 | Msun | Uncertainty on mass_He |
 | chisqhe | float64 |  | chi square value of the fit (pure-He) |

 | e_teffmix | float64 | K | Uncertainty on teff_mixed |
 | loggmix | float64 | cm/s2 | Log of surface gravity from fitting the dereddened G, BP, and RP absolute fluxes with mixed H-He model atmospheres |

 | chisqmix | float64 |  | chi square value of the fit (mixed H-He) |
 | rgeo | float64 | pc | Median of the geometric distance posterior (Bailer-Jones et al., 2021AJ....161..147B, Cat. I/352) |
 | b_rgeo1 | float64 | pc | 16th percentile of the geometric distance posterior (Bailer-Jones et al., 2021AJ....161..147B, Cat. I/352) |

 | fidel_v1 | float64 |  | Astrometric fidelity metric from Rybizki et al., (2021, arXiv:2101.11641) |
